# services.uhub

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.uhub`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.uhub` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Uhub ADC hub instances |
| `services.uhub.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable hub instance. |
| `services.uhub.<name>.enableTLS` | `boolean` | Whether to enable TLS support. |
| `services.uhub.<name>.plugins` | `list of (submodule)` | Uhub plugin configuration. |
| `services.uhub.<name>.plugins.*.plugin` | `absolute path` | Path to plugin file. |
| `services.uhub.<name>.plugins.*.settings` | `attribute set of string` | Settings specific to this plugin. |
| `services.uhub.<name>.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string)` | Configuration of uhub. See <https://www.uhub.org/doc/config.php> for a list of options. |
